name: Pokhara
short_description: Pokhara is a scenic lakeside city known for Phewa Lake, stunning Himalayan views, adventure sports like paragliding, and a peaceful atmosphere making it Nepal’s top tourist destination.

name: Kathmandu
short_description: Kathmandu, Nepal’s capital, blends ancient heritage with modern life. It features UNESCO temples, vibrant streets, historic Durbar Squares, and deep cultural traditions reflecting centuries of Himalayan civilization.

name: Bhaktapur
short_description: Bhaktapur is a preserved medieval city famous for traditional Newari architecture, ancient temples, pottery squares, and rich cultural heritage that offers a glimpse into historic Nepal.

name: Chitwan
short_description: Chitwan is home to Chitwan National Park, famous for wildlife safaris, Bengal tigers, rhinos, elephants, and dense jungles offering one of Nepal’s best nature and adventure experiences.

name: Lumbini
short_description: Lumbini is the birthplace of Lord Buddha and a major pilgrimage site featuring monasteries, sacred gardens, Ashokan pillar, and peaceful spiritual environment attracting visitors worldwide.

name: Mustang
short_description: Mustang is a remote Himalayan region with desert-like landscapes, ancient monasteries, caves, and Tibetan-influenced culture, offering a unique blend of adventure and spirituality.

name: Manang
short_description: Manang is a high-altitude valley surrounded by snow-capped peaks, known for breathtaking scenery, trekking routes, alpine lifestyle, and cultural richness along the Annapurna Circuit.

name: Ghandruk
short_description: Ghandruk is a beautiful Gurung village offering panoramic views of Annapurna and Machhapuchhre, traditional culture, stone houses, and a peaceful trekking experience.

name: Annapurna Base Camp
short_description: Annapurna Base Camp trek takes you into the heart of the Himalayas, offering close-up views of Annapurna massif, diverse landscapes, glaciers, and unforgettable trekking adventure.

name: Mardi Himal
short_description: Mardi Himal trek is a short yet stunning Himalayan trail offering close views of Machhapuchhre, peaceful forests, ridge walks, and fewer crowds compared to popular routes.

name: Langtang Valley
short_description: Langtang Valley trek offers beautiful alpine scenery, Tamang culture, glaciers, forests, and mountain views, making it one of Nepal’s most accessible and rewarding Himalayan treks.

name: Tilicho Lake
short_description: Tilicho Lake is one of the world’s highest lakes, surrounded by dramatic Himalayan peaks, rugged trails, and breathtaking scenery along the Annapurna region.

name: Everest Base Camp
short_description: Everest Base Camp trek is a legendary journey through Sherpa villages, glaciers, and high-altitude landscapes leading to the base of the world’s tallest mountain, Mount Everest.

name: Manaslu Circuit
short_description: Manaslu Circuit trek is a remote Himalayan journey featuring diverse landscapes, Tibetan-influenced culture, suspension bridges, and spectacular views of Mount Manaslu and surrounding peaks.

name: Ghorepani Poonhill
short_description: Ghorepani Poonhill trek is a short and popular route offering stunning sunrise views over Annapurna and Dhaulagiri ranges, along with beautiful rhododendron forests.
